name: Starlight Rider Faceplate
desc2: Equip to increase Rupture Agents' combat capabilities
phaseDescs: CRIT Rate increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>20%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>10%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

CRIT Rate increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>32%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>16%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
